title: Trudesk
description: Open-source helpdesk and ticketing system with email piping, knowledge base, live notifications, and per-team agent workflows.
installation: Trudesk is a Node.js helpdesk that stores all data in MongoDB; the documentdb add-on below provides the MongoDB-compatible backend. The TD_MONGODB_* vars point at the in-cluster documentdb service (host documentdb-service-trudesk-documentdb, port 10260) using SCRAM-SHA-256 over TLS, user 'mongoadmin'. Because the endpoint uses a self-signed cert, TD_MONGODB_AUTHENTICATION_DATABASE is set to admin and the connection allows invalid TLS certs. Rotate the documentdb password from the default 'trudesk' before exposing publicly. On first load open {{KUBERO_APP_URL}}/install to run the web setup wizard, which creates the database schema and your super-admin account. Trudesk runs its own internal Redis for caching/sessions inside the container, so no external Redis add-on is needed. Configure inbound (IMAP mailbox) and outbound (SMTP) email in the admin panel after install to enable ticket creation from email. Uploads and generated assets are persisted on the mounted volume.
